name: WILLIAMS-CAMPBELL SYNDROME
definition: congenital bronchial cartilage deficiency in the 4th-6th bronchial generation either diffuse or
dominant_finding: cystic bronchiectasis distal to 3rd bronchial generation
discriminating_features: cystic bronchiectasis distal to 3rd bronchial generation
inspiratory ballooning + expiratory collapse of dilated segments

HRCT: cystic bronchiectasis distal to 3rd bronchial generation
inspiratory ballooning + expiratory collapse of dilated segments
